languages.text: {n}Бионический глаз Себериана с жужжанием фокусируется на Ульфаре, и его голос звучит почти благоговейно:{/n} "Я не ведал, что Диодас сумел заручиться поддержкой Ангелов Бога-Императора. Однако даже перед лицом Его Ангела я не могу отказаться от обязательств, возложенных на меня Патентом".

traits.locale_text: {n}Бионический глаз Себериана с жужжанием фокусируется на Ульфаре, и его голос звучит почти благоговейно:{/n} "Я не ведал, что Диодас сумел заручиться поддержкой Ангелов Бога-Императора. Однако даже перед лицом Его Ангела я не могу отказаться от обязательств, возложенных на меня Патентом".

languages.text: {n}Seberian's bionic eye whirrs as it focuses on Ulfar, and the Rogue Trader's voice sounds almost reverent:{/n} "I was not aware that Diodas had managed to secure the support of the God-Emperor's Angels. However, even faced with His Angel, I cannot forsake the duties placed upon me by the Warrant."
languages.original_text: {n}Бионический глаз Себериана с жужжанием фокусируется на Ульфаре, и его голос звучит почти благоговейно:{/n} "Я не ведал, что Диодас сумел заручиться поддержкой Ангелов Бога-Императора. Однако даже перед лицом Его Ангела я не могу отказаться от обязательств, возложенных на меня Патентом".

However, even faced with His Angel, I cannot forsake the duties placed upon me by the Warrant."

However, even faced with His Angel, I cannot forsake the duties placed upon me by the Warrant."

However, even faced with His Angel, I cannot forsake the duties placed upon me by the Warrant."

languages.text: {n}塞贝里安的仿生眼嗡嗡转动，聚焦在乌尔法身上。行商浪人的语气顿时变得近乎虔诚：{/n}“我倒没想到狄奥达斯竟有本事争取到神皇天使的支援。不过，即便面对祂的天使，我也不能背弃贸易授状加诸我身的职责。”
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's bionic eye whirrs as it focuses on Ulfar, and the Rogue Trader's voice sounds almost reverent:{/n} "I was not aware that Diodas had managed to secure the support of the God-Emperor's Angels. However, even faced with His Angel, I cannot forsake the duties placed upon me by the Warrant."

traits.locale_text: {n}塞贝里安的仿生眼嗡嗡转动，聚焦在乌尔法身上。行商浪人的语气顿时变得近乎虔诚：{/n}“我倒没想到狄奥达斯竟有本事争取到神皇天使的支援。不过，即便面对祂的天使，我也不能背弃贸易授状加诸我身的职责。”

languages.text: {n}L'œil bionique de Seberian ronronne alors qu'il se focalise sur Ulfar, et la voix du libre-marchand prend une tonalité empreinte d'un respect confinant à la déférence :{/n} « J'ignorais que Diodas avait réussi à s'assurer le soutien des anges de l'Empereur-Dieu. Pour autant, même face à Son auguste émissaire, je ne peux négliger les devoirs qui m'incombent en vertu de la lettre de marque. »
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's bionic eye whirrs as it focuses on Ulfar, and the Rogue Trader's voice sounds almost reverent:{/n} "I was not aware that Diodas had managed to secure the support of the God-Emperor's Angels. However, even faced with His Angel, I cannot forsake the duties placed upon me by the Warrant."

traits.locale_text: {n}L'œil bionique de Seberian ronronne alors qu'il se focalise sur Ulfar, et la voix du libre-marchand prend une tonalité empreinte d'un respect confinant à la déférence :{/n} « J'ignorais que Diodas avait réussi à s'assurer le soutien des anges de l'Empereur-Dieu. Pour autant, même face à Son auguste émissaire, je ne peux négliger les devoirs qui m'incombent en vertu de la lettre de marque. »

languages.text: {n}Seberian'ın Ulfar'a odaklanan biyonik gözü vızıldıyor. Hür Tacir'in sesi neredeyse saygı barındırıyor.{/n} "Diodas'ın, Tanrı İmparator'un Meleklerinin desteğini almayı başardığından haberim yoktu. Ancak O'nun Meleği ile yüz yüze bakıyor olsam bile Ruhsatname'nin bana yüklediği vazifelerden vazgeçemem."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's bionic eye whirrs as it focuses on Ulfar, and the Rogue Trader's voice sounds almost reverent:{/n} "I was not aware that Diodas had managed to secure the support of the God-Emperor's Angels. However, even faced with His Angel, I cannot forsake the duties placed upon me by the Warrant."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian'ın Ulfar'a odaklanan biyonik gözü vızıldıyor. Hür Tacir'in sesi neredeyse saygı barındırıyor.{/n} "Diodas'ın, Tanrı İmparator'un Meleklerinin desteğini almayı başardığından haberim yoktu. Ancak O'nun Meleği ile yüz yüze bakıyor olsam bile Ruhsatname'nin bana yüklediği vazifelerden vazgeçemem."

languages.text: {n}El ojo biónico de Seberian zumba al centrarse en Ulfar, y la voz del Comerciante Independiente casi tiene un tono de reverencia:{/n} «No sabía que Diodas se hubiese ganado el apoyo de los ángeles del Dios Emperador. Pero, aunque me enfrente a uno de sus ángeles, no abandonaré el deber que me impone la Patente».
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's bionic eye whirrs as it focuses on Ulfar, and the Rogue Trader's voice sounds almost reverent:{/n} "I was not aware that Diodas had managed to secure the support of the God-Emperor's Angels. However, even faced with His Angel, I cannot forsake the duties placed upon me by the Warrant."

traits.locale_text: {n}El ojo biónico de Seberian zumba al centrarse en Ulfar, y la voz del Comerciante Independiente casi tiene un tono de reverencia:{/n} «No sabía que Diodas se hubiese ganado el apoyo de los ángeles del Dios Emperador. Pero, aunque me enfrente a uno de sus ángeles, no abandonaré el deber que me impone la Patente».

languages.text: {n}Seberians bionisches Auge richtet sich surrend auf Ulfar und die Stimme des Freihändlers klingt beinahe ehrfürchtig:{/n} "Mir war nicht bewusst, dass es Diodas gelungen ist, sich die Unterstützung der Engel des Gottimperators zu sichern. Allerdings kann ich selbst in Gegenwart Seines Engels die mir durch den Handelsbrief auferlegten Pflichten nicht vernachlässigen."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's bionic eye whirrs as it focuses on Ulfar, and the Rogue Trader's voice sounds almost reverent:{/n} "I was not aware that Diodas had managed to secure the support of the God-Emperor's Angels. However, even faced with His Angel, I cannot forsake the duties placed upon me by the Warrant."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberians bionisches Auge richtet sich surrend auf Ulfar und die Stimme des Freihändlers klingt beinahe ehrfürchtig:{/n} "Mir war nicht bewusst, dass es Diodas gelungen ist, sich die Unterstützung der Engel des Gottimperators zu sichern. Allerdings kann ich selbst in Gegenwart Seines Engels die mir durch den Handelsbrief auferlegten Pflichten nicht vernachlässigen."

languages.text: {n}セベリアンの義眼がウルファルに焦点を合わせ、ローグ・トレーダーの声は神聖な響きを帯びる:{/n}「ディオダスが神帝の天使の支援を得たことを知らなかった。しかし、神帝の天使に直面しても、私は証書に課せられた義務を放棄することはできない。」
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's bionic eye whirrs as it focuses on Ulfar, and the Rogue Trader's voice sounds almost reverent:{/n} "I was not aware that Diodas had managed to secure the support of the God-Emperor's Angels. However, even faced with His Angel, I cannot forsake the duties placed upon me by the Warrant."

traits.locale_text: {n}セベリアンの義眼がウルファルに焦点を合わせ、ローグ・トレーダーの声は神聖な響きを帯びる:{/n}「ディオダスが神帝の天使の支援を得たことを知らなかった。しかし、神帝の天使に直面しても、私は証書に課せられた義務を放棄することはできない。」
